search_query: narrowest point of regurgitant jet echo
combined_text: Vena contracta Vena contractanavigation search Vena contracta is the narrowest region of a jet that occurs just below the orifice of a regurgitant valve as assessed by colour flow mapping during echocardiography. Vena contracta is smaller than the regurgitant orifice and is characterized by high velocity, laminar
